title: To Fashion
content:
Fashion! Lovely Dame!
    Pledge in sparkling wine!
    Let us add her name
    To the Muses' nine!

    Though the lovely Nin
    All should pass away
    Why should Woman pine,
    If but Fashion stay?

    Tho' the Muses' lore
    Molder on the shelf,
    Still may She adore
    In Fashion's glass--Herself.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oliver Herford delivers a powerful performance in "To Fashion"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
